name: jf-skills
description: Agent skill stack for manuscripts targeted at The Journal of Finance (JF), the flagship general-interest finance journal of the American Finance Association. Covers general-interest topic selection, literature positioning, causal identification and asset-pricing test design, robustness and multiple-testing discipline, accessible exposition, the journal-hosted Internet Appendix, submission preflight, and the multi-round referee process. Bilingual en / zh-CN docs; Stata / R / Python pointers.
